horoscope: Venus leaves your sign today and enters your personal resources sector, dear Aries, where it will transit until April 24th. Your affections stabilize during this cycle. You could be spending more money on beautiful things, comfort items, and things you expect will last. You are attracting the good things in life! Salary increases are possible, and any gifts coming into your life in the coming weeks tend to be more notable or lavish than usual. More importantly, you're attracting more respect. With love and friendship, you look for familiarity and security. You're more interested in getting comfortable than seeking new experiences. It's a time to see and appreciate your efforts. This transit boosts your powers of attraction with money, gifts, favors, and valuables. Increased self-respect reverberates and benefits you. Today's transits are good for getting organized and taking care of business, and enjoying yourself as you do.

Venus moves into your sign today, dear Taurus, where it will transit until April 24th. During this pleasant cycle, you radiate good energy, and you tend to attract positive attention and feedback as a result. There can be more clarity in love or with your affections. Others recognize your more attractive and desirable traits, and you tend to do more self-pampering or treat yourself to things you genuinely enjoy. It's time to live well and put out the right kind of vibes to attract pleasantness into your life. Because Venus also rules your work and health sector, it can also be a good period for improving your sense of wellness and your daily affairs and routines. Today, while you might aim to avoid becoming sidetracked by time-wasting activities, you're inclined to enjoy yourself. It's a natural and easy day for making contacts and connections.

Venus moves into the sign behind yours today, dear Gemini, and will visit this area of your solar chart until April 24th. Your affections can be complicated, or relationships can be complex during this cycle. There can be a greater love of private moments, and you might enjoy a certain measure of solitude, as well as benefits and help from behind the scenes. You might do more for others during this period, although there is every reason to take your time with matters of the heart, decisions about love, and money or pleasure. It can be a quieter, private period for your social life. You tend to mull things over or do some soul-searching in the weeks ahead. This cycle precedes the Venus in Gemini cycle that will begin on April 24th and bring everything to the surface. Until then, you might gain a greater understanding of your past and your deeper feelings about recent events. Today is strong for comfortably working on any recent money-making or business project at a gentle pace. Enjoying the comfort of familiar surroundings, sharing memories, and reminiscing can be in the spotlight.

Venus moves into your social sector today, dear Cancer, where it will transit until April 24th. With this move, Venus is now in a supportive relationship to your sign for the coming weeks, and you'll find it natural to express your feelings and attract what you want into your life. There can be interesting connections with and through friends made in the weeks ahead. It's easier than usual for you to attract friends and people with common interests. You're accommodating with friends and might gain a stronger sense of fulfillment through activities with and for others. Your tastes are for the new, different, and progressive. Today, you're more emotionally invested than usual in your ideas, beliefs, intelligence, and feelings of belonging.

In the weeks ahead, you'll find it easier to cooperate and charm others, dear Leo, particularly in public or professional settings. Venus heads into your solar tenth house of career and reputation. Responsibilities in love become clearer in the coming weeks, or there can be a pleasant boost to your reputation. You may negotiate with greater ease until April 24th, or you may enjoy increased social and financial opportunities through your business or professional dealings. People are more likely to acknowledge and notice your creativity, charm, or warmth. Life seems to showcase your talents more readily. You may be drawing upon your people skills more than usual in your work during this cycle. This transit sometimes coincides with rewards, awards, or changes in relationship status. Today, you're seeking some level of predictability and finding comfort in the familiar, tried-and-true, and routine.

Venus moves into harmony with your sign today, dear Virgo, and will continue to enhance your life in subtle but magical ways until April 24th. This transit inspires you, highlighting your natural strengths for all to see and enjoy. The weeks ahead are for sharing your joy. This transit gently and pleasantly stirs your desire for more variety and diversity in your life. Your tastes for pleasures, people, and places can be just a little more out of the ordinary. A spirit of adventure and discovery takes hold. Your personality is admired and appreciated -- those qualities that come most naturally to you are qualities that people generally enjoy at this time. Sharing your viewpoint with someone special can elevate a relationship. Today, there is a nice spirit of cooperation, with a comfortable level of intimacy as well.

Venus heads into your solar eighth house today, dear Libra, where it will visit until April 24th. This cycle encourages a desire to be close to someone or to spend extra time on a project or venture you love. Focusing your love and energy can be especially attractive and rewarding in the weeks ahead. Coming to peaceful agreements about money is possible, or you may find it easier to attract support. This cycle favors working on the more complicated or intricate areas of relationships, sharing, and intimacy. You're taking your private life more seriously! Today, the Moon is in your privacy sector, inclining you to spend extra time resting and healing.

Venus begins its transit of your partnership sector today, dear Scorpio, boosting your relationships until April 24th. It's an excellent cycle for attracting pleasant people into your life or improving current relationships. Resolving conflicts comes naturally, and you benefit from others' feedback, help, or input more so than usual. This transit stirs your desire for companionship. Sharing pleasures and activities can be particularly appealing in the weeks ahead. Negotiations, compromises, and agreements are favored. Today's rather easy energy is not necessarily motivating, but it can help you feel supported and content.

Venus begins its transit of your work and health sector today, dear Sagittarius, where it will visit until April 24th. The weeks ahead are strong for bringing more harmony, enjoyment, and even aesthetic appeal to your daily life and working environment. Restoring balance to working relationships can be the focus, and perhaps some social opportunities can emerge through your work or daily routines. It may not be the most productive time of year, but it serves a useful purpose, as the enjoyment of your work and routines is important. This cycle favors enjoyment of projects, organizing, watching your nutrition, and similar activities. Work that requires specialized people skills can thrive, or a personal touch can improve your work or services. Today's Moon increases your sense of responsibility, and you're connecting with your practical priorities.

Venus moves into your solar fifth house for a stay until April 24th, dear Capricorn. During this period, you gravitate to situations and activities that allow you to express your need for play and reinforcement. It's an especially favorable cycle for enjoying yourself and expressing your warmth and confidence. As you do, your natural talents, strengths, and attractive qualities reveal themselves, and people appreciate them more than usual! It's one of the year's better periods for personal magnetism, romance, and creative expression. You are looking at the world through heart-shaped glasses. Hobbies and pleasurable activities can be gratifying. Today, you look for opportunities to spread your wings, as your desire to explore new ideas and try new activities is strong.

Venus heads into your home and family sector today, dear Aquarius, where it will transit until April 24th. This cycle benefits your home and family, your personal life, your foundations, and your primary attachments. Venus here can boost your relationships with family, but it can also improve your relationship with yourself as you learn about your needs and wants. It's a strong period for plumping your nest or your base of operations. You might invest your energies into making your place of retreat as comfortable and harmonious as possible. It's a strong recharge point for you, particularly with your affections. You can get to your very heart now, gaining a fresh understanding of what you need from life regarding love, pleasure, comfort, and beauty. Today, background and detail work can thrive. Look for ways to boost your projects. Relationships strengthen through emotional centering and sharing quiet moments rather than over-focusing on conversation and activity.

Venus moves into your communications sector today, dear Pisces, where it will stay until April 24th. This Venus transit refines, improves, and enhances your abilities to socialize, learn, communicate, and make connections. Your ideas or projects get good press in the weeks ahead. There could be purchases or gifts that help you connect and learn. Love can be more verbal or mental during this cycle. Learning activities or projects and personal interests can be delightful. Friendships might form digitally or through studies, and it's a fine time to harmonize with siblings, acquaintances, classmates, and neighbors. You're expressing yourself warmly, kindly, and appealingly. Today, there is easy, comfortable, and comforting energy for relating, creating, playing, and sharing.
